body_excerpt: In run_posix_cpu_timers of posix-cpu-timers.c, there is a possible way to trigger a use-after-free on a sigqueue object due to memory corruption. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In run_posix_cpu_timers of posix-cpu-timers.c, there is a possible way to trigger a use-after-free on a sigqueue object due to memory corruption. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with
